name: 22q11_21_DiGeorge_VCFS_LCR22
description: 22q11.21 DiGeorge / Velocardiofacial syndrome region, flanked by four LCR22 SD blocks (A, B, C, D) at >97% identity. Most common pathogenic recurrent microdeletion in humans (~1 in 4000). NAHR between LCR22-A and LCR22-D creates the canonical 3 Mb deletion; A-B and A-C deletions are smaller nested forms.

architecture.internal_structure: Four LCR22 blocks (A, B, C, D) of ~250-400 kb each, containing GGT/PRODH/USP18/BCRP paralogs at >97% identity; unique core contains TBX1, COMT, CRKL, DGCR8, RTN4R, HIRA.
